properties.name: South Texas Uranium Province / Belt
properties.description: Representative point for the South Texas coastal-plain uranium province where roll-front uranium deposits and ISR projects are concentrated.
properties.sourceName: SEC Exhibit 96.1 - enCore South Texas Integrated Uranium Projects technical report
properties.notes: Regional centroid; not a boundary or site entrance.

properties.name: Karnes Uranium Mining District
properties.description: Representative point for the Karnes County uranium district, one of Texas's most important historical uranium mining areas.
properties.sourceName: Mindat - Karnes Uranium Mining District nearby localities
properties.notes: Representative district point based on cluster of documented localities.

properties.name: Live Oak / Mount Lucas Uranium Trend
properties.status: Historical ISR and roll-front uranium area
properties.description: Representative point for the Live Oak County / Mount Lucas uranium trend, a South Texas ISR and historical mine area.
properties.sourceName: Mindat - Mount Lucas Mine, Live Oak County, Texas
properties.notes: Uses Mount Lucas coordinate as an anchor for the broader trend.

properties.name: Duval County Palangana-Rosita Uranium Trend
properties.status: ISR uranium trend and project cluster
properties.operator: enCore Energy / Uranium Energy Corp. / historical operators
properties.description: Representative point for the Duval County uranium trend containing Palangana, Rosita, and related ISR project areas.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Regional trend point; not a wellfield boundary.

properties.name: Goliad Formation Roll-Front Uranium Trend
properties.description: Representative point for the Goliad Formation uranium roll-front trend that hosts multiple South Texas ISR projects.
properties.sourceName: USGS Science Data Catalog - ISR uranium extraction spatial extent data
properties.notes: Formation/trend point; not a legal geologic boundary.

properties.name: Burke Hollow ISR Uranium Project
properties.description: Large greenfield ISR uranium project in southeastern Bee County; production began in 2026 and is processed through the Hobson hub-and-spoke platform.
properties.sourceName: Uranium Energy Corp. - Burke Hollow production commencement news release
properties.notes: Coordinate is the nominal center of the lease from a UEC filing; project boundaries are not shown.

properties.name: Burke Hollow Production Area 1
properties.description: Representative point for Burke Hollow's initial production area within the broader ISR project.
properties.sourceName: SEC - Uranium Energy Corp. Form 10-K Burke Hollow location
properties.notes: Offset representative point within the Burke Hollow project; not a precise well location.

properties.name: Rosita Production Area 5 / Wellfield 5
properties.description: Rosita wellfield southwest of the Rosita CPP that supplied uranium-loaded resin during the restarted Rosita operation.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: enCore describes Wellfield 5 as less than one mile southwest of the Rosita CPP; point is representative.

properties.name: Alta Mesa ISR Uranium Project
properties.operator: enCore Energy / Boss Energy joint venture
properties.description: Established ISR uranium project and wellfield complex near Encino in Brooks County, with a central processing plant and operating wellfields.
properties.sourceName: Alta Mesa Uranium Project technical report
properties.notes: Coordinates from technical report; project area is larger than the point.

properties.name: Alta Mesa PAA-7 Wellfield Area
properties.operator: enCore Energy / Boss Energy joint venture
properties.description: Representative point for the PAA-7 wellfield area that has been part of Alta Mesa's resumed extraction operations.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Representative offset within Alta Mesa; not a production-well coordinate.

properties.name: La Palangana ISR Uranium Project
properties.description: Palangana/La Palangana ISR project north of Benavides, historically operated as part of South Texas ISR uranium development.
properties.sourceName: NRC - La Palangana site draft completion review report
properties.notes: NRC source provides GPS coordinates for La Palangana.

properties.name: La Palangana PA-4 Area
properties.description: Representative point for Palangana PA-4, a production-area authorization and delineation area within the Palangana project.
properties.sourceName: SEC Exhibit - Uranium Energy Corp. Texas Hub-and-Spoke ISR Platform
properties.notes: Representative point; not an exact production-well or lease boundary.

properties.name: Kingsville Dome ISR Wellfield
properties.status: Standby / reclamation context in recent EIA reporting
properties.description: Kingsville Dome ISR uranium wellfield southeast of Kingsville, historically one of Texas's important ISR uranium sites.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Approximate point based on project location southeast of Kingsville; not a permit boundary.

properties.name: Hobson ISR Processing Plant
properties.description: Central processing plant that anchors UEC's South Texas hub-and-spoke ISR platform and processes uranium-loaded resin from satellite projects.
properties.sourceName: SEC Exhibit - Uranium Energy Corp. Texas Hub-and-Spoke ISR Platform
properties.notes: Coordinate uses public GPS point for the Hobson/Panna Maria site area; verify before field use.

properties.name: Rosita Central Processing Plant
properties.description: Rosita CPP west of Corpus Christi, a central processing plant serving Rosita and planned satellite ISR feeds.
properties.sourceName: SEC Exhibit 96.1 - enCore South Texas Integrated Uranium Projects technical report
properties.notes: SEC technical report provides decimal coordinates.

properties.name: Alta Mesa Central Processing Plant
properties.operator: enCore Energy / Boss Energy joint venture
properties.description: Central processing plant and mine office at Alta Mesa near Encino in Brooks County.
properties.sourceName: Alta Mesa Uranium Project technical report
properties.notes: Coordinates from technical report; facility sits within broader Alta Mesa project.

properties.name: Kingsville Dome Central Processing Plant
properties.description: ISR central processing plant and wellfield complex southeast of Kingsville with historical production capacity.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Approximate facility point based on public location description; not a survey point.

properties.name: La Palangana Satellite ISR Facility
properties.description: Satellite ISR facility/project point for La Palangana near Benavides.
properties.sourceName: NRC - La Palangana site draft completion review report
properties.notes: NRC source provides GPS coordinates for the La Palangana site.

properties.name: Falls City UMTRCA Disposal Site
properties.operator: U.S. Department of Energy Office of Legacy Management
properties.description: UMTRCA Title I uranium mill tailings disposal site near Falls City, managed for long-term care by DOE Legacy Management.
properties.sourceName: U.S. DOE Office of Legacy Management - Falls City, Texas Disposal Site
properties.notes: Approximate point southwest of Falls City; use DOE site materials for legal boundaries.

properties.name: Conquista Project Uranium Mill / Tailings Site
properties.description: Former uranium mill and tailings impoundment near Falls City that processed ore from Karnes County surface mines.
properties.sourceName: NRC - Conoco-Phillips Company Conquista Project
properties.notes: Approximate point based on NRC description near Falls City; not a disposal-cell boundary.

properties.name: Goliad ISR Uranium Project
properties.status: Permitted and licensed / not shown as producing
properties.description: Permitted ISR uranium project in north-central Goliad County, part of the UEC Texas hub-and-spoke platform.
properties.sourceName: TCEQ agenda backup - Goliad Project In-Situ Uranium Mine
properties.notes: Approximate point 13.5 miles north of Goliad along the SH 183 project corridor.

properties.name: Salvo ISR Uranium Project
properties.description: Bee County uranium project area in the South Texas Uranium Belt, identified as a satellite project in UEC filings.
properties.sourceName: SEC - Uranium Energy Corp. Form 10-K Salvo project description
properties.notes: Representative Bee County point; not a lease boundary.

properties.name: Nichols ISR Uranium Project
properties.description: Central Karnes County ISR uranium property covered by historical leases and technical reporting.
properties.sourceName: Uranium Energy Corp. Nichols NI 43-101 technical report
properties.notes: Representative central Karnes County point; not a legal boundary.

properties.name: Rosita South - Cadena ISR Project
properties.status: Satellite feed / exploration and project development
properties.description: Rosita South-Cadena project area southwest of the Rosita CPP, a potential satellite source for Rosita processing.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Point estimated roughly 3.5 miles southwest of Rosita CPP from company description.

properties.name: Upper Spring Creek - Brown Area
properties.description: Upper Spring Creek Brown Area uranium project south-southwest of George West, intended as a Rosita satellite project.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy 2026 annual filing excerpt - Upper Spring Creek Brown coordinates
properties.notes: Public filing excerpt gives decimal coordinates.

properties.name: Upper Spring Creek - Brevard Area
properties.description: Brevard-area uranium project in Live Oak County, part of enCore's South Texas satellite project portfolio.
properties.sourceName: SEC Exhibit 96.1 - enCore South Texas Integrated Uranium Projects technical report
properties.notes: Representative point in Live Oak County; exact project boundary not provided in public map data used here.

properties.name: Butler Ranch ISR Project
properties.description: Butler Ranch uranium project in the southwestern Karnes uranium mining district, positioned as a future satellite feed to Rosita.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Representative point in the southwestern Karnes district.

properties.name: Mesteña Grande Exploration Area
properties.status: Large exploration option / resource expansion area
properties.operator: enCore Energy / Boss Energy joint venture
properties.description: Large exploration option adjacent to Alta Mesa, representing longer-term resource expansion acreage.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Representative point for broad acreage; not a boundary.

properties.name: Rosita Deep Oakville Exploration Program
properties.description: Deep Oakville Formation exploration program associated with Rosita South-Cadena, targeting additional mineralized sands below shallower Rosita resources.
properties.sourceName: enCore Energy - South Texas ISR Uranium Operations
properties.notes: Representative point near Rosita South; not a drill-hole coordinate.

properties.name: Brysch Uranium Mine
properties.description: Historical Karnes County uranium mine east of Falls City; USGS reports ore mined during 1966-1967.
properties.sourceName: USGS - Geology of the Brysch uranium mine, Karnes County, Texas
properties.notes: Approximate point about 3 miles east of Falls City based on USGS description.

properties.name: Tordilla Hill Uranium Deposits
properties.description: Historical oxidized uranium deposit area studied by USGS in the Tordilla Hill-Deweesville district.
properties.sourceName: USGS Professional Paper 765 - Tordilla Hill-Deweesville uranium deposits
properties.notes: Representative point for the Tordilla Hill portion of the district.

properties.name: Deweesville / Luckett Uranium Deposit Area
properties.description: Representative point for the Deweesville-Luckett end of the Karnes County oxidized uranium deposit trend.
properties.sourceName: USGS Professional Paper 765 - Tordilla Hill-Deweesville uranium deposits
properties.notes: Representative deposit-area point; not an individual pit.

properties.name: Vasquez ISR Wellfield
properties.description: Former ISR satellite wellfield northwest of Hebbronville that operated in the 2000s and later entered reclamation/restoration.
